title: tontelea micrantha
intro: Tontelea micrantha, a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, is a medicinal plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Tontelea micrantha include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, making it a valuable herbal remedy in the region. Tontelea micrantha is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are used in herbal preparations to extract its medicinal properties.
